forecast-period.text: Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloud clearing. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Keith, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly clear. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

The chance of morning fog. Patches of morning frost in the west. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. The chance of morning frost in the west. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloud clearing. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Cloud clearing. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Hawker in the morning. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Patches of morning frost on and east of the ranges. The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost near the west coast. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the far west. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming easterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Yunta in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
